div.p: 56 bytes total — Describes a loadable segment for the OS loader
Virtual Address ┌─────────────────┐ p_vaddr │ File content │ │ (p_filesz) │ ├─────────────────┤ p_vaddr + p_filesz │ Zero-filled │ │ (p_memsz-filesz)│ └─────────────────┘ p_vaddr + p_memsz

text.tspan: // p_offset: Where in FILE to find segment
// p_vaddr: Where in MEMORY to load it
// p_offset: Where in FILE to find segment
// p_vaddr: Where in MEMORY to load it
// p_filesz: Bytes to read from file
// p_memsz: Bytes to allocate in memory
// p_filesz: Bytes to read from file
// p_memsz: Bytes to allocate in memory
// 1. Read p_filesz bytes from file at p_offset
// 2. mmap() them to virtual address p_vaddr
// 1. Read p_filesz bytes from file at p_offset
// 2. mmap() them to virtual address p_vaddr
